notes: No recovery layer, no overlay, no floating hints.
Reason for change: CC7.3.0/31 still produced an external code.run app confirmation dialog in MAX, which is unacceptable.

User reminded that early project builds successfully used an internal MAX link path. This is now used as fallback: native open_app first, then internal max.ru bot start link, never direct code.run app link for the visible comments button.
Functional code changed in services/maxApi.js. The top /debug/cc7 runtime may still show CC7.3.1 if loader marker has not been bumped, but package/build and maxApi are CC7.3.2.
Next clean target remains postSnapshot rendering inside comments: store text/media/format/link at patch time and show the original post above the discussion.
